content: (The picture of the Shaykh al-Mujahid Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani Al-Shami, the official spokesperson of the Islamic State, written by Shayh Turki al-Benali). Khilafah Dawla Islamiyah. Biography of Syaikh Al-Adnani, the Manjanik of Daulah Islam, Shoutussalam Islamic Media, presents, the Bahasa translation of a Summary. Title of Summary:  Al-Lafzhu As-Sani min Tarjamah Al-‘Adnani. Title of translation: Biograhy of Syaikh Al-Adnani, the Manjanik of Daulah Islam. Author: Syaikh Turki Al-Bin’ali. Date of publishing: 26 May 2014; Translator: Ganna Pryadha.  In the name of God, The Most Beneficent, The Most Merciful. Prolog. Praise to God that make those who adhere to tauhid, noble. Shalawat and salam for Prophet who was honest and can be trusted, and also for his relatives and companions. Actually for man with the calibre of Syaikh Mujahid Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani, hopefully Allah protects him, his biography is no longer needed to be explained. The ulama said, “people who are famous no need to be introduced again”.  However, recently, I witnessed many violation and harrasment against symbols of ummah, its figures, heroes, and warriors, to the extent that I hear a student of a Shia Rafidhoh Hani As-Siba’i harrassed our syeikh with distortions and lies.  He labelled him with harrasing and humiliating labels.  An Arabic proverb said, “each container will pour its content”.  Therefore, it is good for me to write brief biography of the Warrior who delivered explanation and statement (read: spokesman) who is liked by the guardian of God and hated by His enemies! Imam Muslim revealed a hadith, from Ibn Sirin Rahimahullahu which said, “in the past, they (ulamas) have never asked about sanad (transmission of words of Prophet Muhammad.  However when there were slanders, they said  ‘Mention to us your rijal (the narrator of hadits).’ If we see that the rijal is from Ahlussunnah, his hadith must be accepted, and if it from those who practiced bid’ah, their hadith is not accepted.” Struggle to seek knowledge.  Since little, Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani Asy-Syami has grown with love towards mosques.  He often visited them.  When little, he also like to read and study.  To the extent that when his family and relatives were about to buy him presents, they would buy story books and small books for him. Because they know that little Al-Adnani like book more, so they prioritise to buy him books compared to children toy children.  Therefore, Syaikh Al-Adnani obtained many general knowledge since little. He would read any book on his hand, including books on language, philosophy, etc. Then Syaikh Al-Adnani would be given change to participate in halaqah (religious study session) on Al-Quran, and he started to deepen his Al-Quran reading to one of a Al-Quran reader, then he memorised Al-Quran, and was able to finish the memorising perfectly in less than a year! His reading hobby made Syaikh Al-Adnani shifted from books with general topic to books with specifict topics in science of (Islam) religion —started from the books of Al-Quran interpretation. His favourite tafsir (interpretation of Al-Qur’an ) book was Tafsir Ibn Katsir which he red multiple times, then Fi Zhilal Al-Qur`an tafsir book. This was to the extent that Syaikh Al-Adnani liked the writing style of Fi Zhilal Al-Qur`an tafsir that much. He also reads the books on hadits, especially the longest literatures, according to him, which was the Shahih (authentic) Al-Bukhari dan Shahih Muslim books that he alternatively studied.  He also reads the general fiqh (Islamic jurisprudence) book. Syaikh Al-Adnani really liked books authored by Imam Asy-Syaukani Rahimahullahu, especially Nail Al-Authar book, and he really studied the explanation of fiqh on jihad. Syaikh Al-Adnani also read books such as Masyari’ Al-Aswaq which he red more than three times.  And so were books on sirah (biography) and tarikh (history) which is given the utmost priority, especially the book of Al-Bidayah wa An-Nihayah which was read for six times. Meanwhile books on language and Arabic literatures, mention both literatures as you wish.  This is because both were science that he mastered most! Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani had studied almost all civic (literature) books such as Al-Bayan wa At-Tabyin, Al-‘Aqdu Al-Farid book, etc. He also red dawawin (related to poems of Arabs) books such as Al-Mu’allaqat and their syarh (books that explained about them), and memorised many of their poems. I suspect that Syaikh Al-Adnani knew by heart (book of poem of) Al-Mutanabbi. He said about Al-Mutanabbi, “I do not see it except I feel the condition of Arab during the time of Jahiliyah and Islam.” In addition, he also masters the science of nahwu (Arabic grammar) and studied Al-Ajrumiyah, Qatrun-nada, and Alfiyah Ibn Malik books.  He also read mu’jam (dictionary) books, such as Lisanul-‘Arab written by Ibnu Manzhur, etc. There is no noble except for those who are expert in science because they are above the guidance.  Whoever asked for guidance, they will get dalil-dalil (proof). Weighing of every person is what makes him good.  For those who are expert on science, stupid people are enemies for their teachers.  Besides studying and obtain knowledge from various literature books, Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani also studied from various ulama figures in Sham. Considering tight security condition in Syria under the clutches of thaghut, Syaikh Al-Adnani and his colleagues agreed secretly to study together alternatively in a number of houses for years.  Then God gave him opportunity to go Iraq, to study to a number of ulama.  Some ulamas who became his teachers: 1. Syaikh Abu Anas Asy-Syami Rahimahullahu. Syaikh Al-Adnani accompanied him for a long time, so he could take many good things from him including benefiting from his knowledge.  Syaikh Al-Adnani commented his teachers in two beautiful poems: From Sham there are three lions of Iraq, Abu Anas whose roars would eliminate all calamity and the happiness raised.  In terms of knowledge, he is like sea.  In battle, he is strategist like engineer. In hadith science, he is the ulama.  In politics, he is a genius; 2. Syaikh Abu Maisarah Al-Gharib Rahimahullahu. Syaikh Al-Adnani accompanied him well when he was in prison or free, and learned many things from him; 3. Amirul Mukminin Abu Bakar Al-Baghdadi Hafizhahullahu. Syaikh Al-Adnani completed the reading of Al-Quran perfectly to Syaikh Abu Bakar, through his memorising.  Syaikh Abu Bakar was impressed to the extent that “I have never seen a person with such (memorised) recitation like him, but his recitation (referring to Syaikh Al-Adnani)”. Do not take knowledge but from the expert.  We live with knowledge and we sacrifice with our life. Therefore keep distance from seating near stupid ones.  People will deviate if guided by stupid people.  The books and papers of (Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani).  Due to time constraints, most of his writings are in scripts or separated poems.  One of his prominent writings and in the form of manzhumah or mantsur(natsar/essay): 1. Matan (text) on fiqh and jihad matters; 2. Manzhumah fiqh on jihad.  However, American troops robbed the manuscript when Syaikh Al-Adnani was in prison; 3. As-Silsilah Adz-Dzahabiyah fi Al-A’mal Al-Qalbiyah, script on the deeds of heart and its matters; 4. Mu’inah Al-Huffazh, script that guides those who memorised Al-Quran, and its related matters; 5. Qashidah fi Dzikri Ma’rakah Al-Fallujah Ats-Tsaniyah, comprising more than 200 lines of poems; 6. Peoms titled Al-Qa`idi. It is a compilation of honorary poems to rebut those who criticised Al-Qaida first generation. To teach and deliver sermons.  Syaikh Al-Adnani paid high attention to ta’lim (education) activity and tadris (teaching), especially for mujahidin fi sabilillah. Even Syaikh Al-had given around 14 hours per day lesson for them. Syaikh Al-Adnani also strived and worked hard to teach sharia knowledge in general, and lessons in akidah (faith), Al-Quran, languange, and specifically on fiqh on jihad. In the field of akidah, Syaikh Al-Adnani taught almost all books consisted matan (content) on akidah such as: 1. Al-Ushul Ats-Tsalatsah (three main principles); 2. Al-Qawa’id Al-Arba’ (four principles of Akidah); 3. Syuruth wa Nawaqidh La Ilaha Illallah (requirements and annulment of Tauhid).  Furthermore, Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani also paid attention on the matter of education on faiths, infidel matters, and everyhing related to that serious matter.  With regards to Al-Quran, Syaikh Al-Adnani made himself available to give sermons in various halaqah tashhih tilawah (study on correcting Al-Quran reading) and halaqah tahfizh (memorising Al-Quran). In all of those halaqah, Syaikh Al-Adnani prioritised to teach those who cannot read and write Al-Quran. Syaikh Al-Adnani who is also a spokesman of Daulah Islam also delivered the teaching of Arabic language and taught a number of matan, including matan Al-Ajrumiyah. Syaikh has a special method in teaching science of nahwu, through six teaching that he adopted from some of his teachers.  In chapter on fikih jihad, Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani Asy-Syami taught a number of books, one was what he wrote on fikih and jihad matter, then Al-‘Umdah fi I’dad Al-‘Uddah (karya Syaikh Abdul Qadir bin Abdul Aziz), and various books and other matan; Important designation. Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani Asy-Syami entered tanzim jihad movement since early 2000 where he pledged allegiance to Syaikh Abu Mush’ab Az-Zarqawi Rahimahullahu in Syria with other 35 ikhwan. They conducted i’dad (training) to fight against Nushairiyah regime at that time, prior to the invasion of America to Iraq. When America invaded Iraq, Syaikh Al-Adnani went to Iraq and met with Abu Muhammad Al-Libnani Rahimahullahu. As he was given priority by God, since then always appeared as mujahid in Iraq and Sham. Some of his important designation 1. Instructor in military training camp in Haditha during the time of Jamaah Tauhid wal Jihad; 2. Leader of Haditha military training camp and he was inagurated by Syaikh Abu Mush’ab Az-Zarqawi; 3. Instructor at military training camp in Al-Jazira; 4. Syar’i (ulama who held authority) in Western Sector of Anbar Province; 5. Official spokesman of Daulah Islam Iraq; 6. Official spokesman of Daulah Islam Iraq and Sham; 7. Official spokesman of Daulah Islam (Daulah Khilafah Islamiyah); Trials and tribulation. The journey of dakwah tauhid and jihad were full of trials and tribulation. People taking this path will not escape from torture and imprisonment! The winners of this path are those who are consistent and patient.  Like what was said, “people who do not undergo flaming beginning, hence they will not suffer the sweets of glittering ends.” Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani Hafizhahullahu is a son born from the rigour of such path.  They are those who got tests and tribulation in God’s way. Some of tribulations experienced by Syaikh Al-Adnani: 1. In his early adult years, young Al-Adnani were often called by Syria Shia Nushairiyah security apparatus and interrogated. 2. Imprisoned by Nushairiyah regime three times due to his dakwah and jihad activities, one of which was in Albukamal area, an area whereby for the first time Syaikh Al-Adnani departed to Iraq. Syaikh Al-Adnani was imprisoned for months, until finally released, because he did not want to confes despite being tortured. 3. Arrested by America troops’ prison twice, one of which was imprisoned for six years.  He was also put inside the tent together with Az-Zarqawi’s people, who are prominent figures, first layer of mujahid surrounding Syaikh Abu Mush’ab Az-Zarqawi; 4. There are bruises in his body and had some fractured bones. I hope Allah keep Syaikh Al-Adnani from badness and bless his age and deeds for this umat; His adventerous life. Along the way of his intellectual, dakwah and jihad life, Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani Hafizhahullahu had a few impressed fragments of life, some of them were: 1. The first time he sat down doing halaqah of Al-Quran recitation, in the heart of little Al-Adnani’s soul, he was determined to be the best Al-Quran reader among his friends. For him, Al-Quran is a hobby. When it was time for his recitation, the little Al-Adnani made mistakes, and the teacher corrected his reading. That thing left bad impression in the heart of the teacher.  The reading mistakes made Syaikh Al-Adnani fully determined to make his readings and memorising of Al-Quran perfect; 2. One day, during Al Qur’an recitation session, Syaikh Al-Adnani knew about God’s words:“For they who do not judge in accordance with what God has bestowed from on high are, indeed, deniers of the truth!” (Al-Maa`idah: 44), at that point he was shocked by the verse, than he asked one of his friend, “what is the source of Syria law?” Then his friend replied.  Syaikh Al-Adnani asked again “what is the legislative power?” His friend then replied again. Then Syaikh asked again, “what are the judicative and executive power?” Every time Syaikh Al-Adnani asked, his friend replied with knowledge he obtained from the school. Syaikh Al-Adnani then said, “O Fulan (referring to his friend), it means that our governmet is all infidels!” Listening to such statement, his friend said, “Assalamu’alaikum.” The later then left.  That is the principle of Syaikh Al-Adnani when discussing a matter; 3. One day, when he was a teenager, remaja, Syaikh Al-Adnani was summoned by the intelligence of Syiah Nushairiyah regime. Then one of the thaghut troop asked him, “Why do you grow your beard?” Syaikh Al-Adnan replied, “Because I read a number of Prophet Muhammad Shallallahu ‘Alaihi wa Sallam hadith, which recommended this.” The thaghut troop then said, “Are you the the only one studying the hadith?!” Like how Syaikh Al-Adnani explained to him on the matter of shortening pants, then the infidel troop said to Syaikh, “why do you move your finger when tasyahud (a seating position during prayer)?” Indeed Syaikh Al-Adnani sometimes moved his fingers when he prayed.  Syaikh also replied based on the hadith that he memorised.  The thaghut troop then quipped “the problem is when at night you did this, (he made gesture that tauhid with point finger pointing up without moving. “In the afternoon, you did this,” he said while pointing his finger to the front (describing weapon). Syaikh Al-Adnani said, “since then, without he realised, that cruel troop agigated me to wage jihad.; 4. One day in Iraq, Syaikh Al-Adnani went with three ikhwan to conduct an operation.  But their plan was discovered, and they were ousted by the apostate troops by car.  Eight km later, they had an accident because of speeding.  Two troops attempted to arrest them but Syaikh Al-Adnani quickly escaped, and Abu Bakar Al-Kuwaiti followed him.  Two of them then hid behind big rock.  They both were involved in firefighting with apostate troops from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m. During the firefighting, both mujahid managed to escaped up to 3 km in the desert, until both managed to arrive in a valley.  At that time, the apostate troops withdrew after America troops told them that there was a company of terrorists in the valley.  Shortly thereafter, the American troop convoy came to the valley, armed with 23 army vehicles – tanks and other armors — and six jet fighters. America started to attack by launching two rockets, and instantly killed Abu Bakar Al-Kuwaiti, witnessed by Syaikh Al-Adnani who also suffered severed injury.  Syaikh Al-Adnani carried his weapon and tried hard to combat the enemy with his blood continued flowing from his wound, until he ran out of ammunition.  At that time it has reached Ashar time and showed 16.45 hrs. It is beautiful of what he has done and will do. A screenshot of his life. Allah Ta’ala blesses Syaikh Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani a number of noble matters in each of his intellectual, dakwah, and jihad journey.  Some of them are: 1. Memorise the whole chapter of Al-Maa`idah fully in just one day; 2. He was one of the mujahid who wage jihad for the first time in Haditha with around 13 mujahid. Eventually they can occupy Haditha; 3. When Syaikh Abu Umar Al-Baghdadi Rahimahullahu was trusted as Amir Haditha, Syaikh Al-Adnani became one of his advisors.  Syaikh Abu Umar Al-Baghdadi by then said, “This man will have important position in the future!”; 4. Syaikh Al-Adnani is one of the last batch of mujahid leaving Fallujah together with Syaikh Abu Hamzah Al-Muhajir, Abu Al-Ghadiyah, Abu Ar-Rabi’, Abu Ja’far Al-Maqdisi, and Abu Ashim Al-Urduni; 5. When doing ribath (guarding the boundary) – sometimes — Syaikh Al-Adnani competed to make poems with Syaikh Abu Hamzah Al-Muhajir Rahimahullahu, in which they could spend hours; 6. Syaikh Al-Adnani was so respected by Syaikh Abu Mush’ab Az-Zarqawi, to the extent that the leaders of the martyrs told Syaikh Al-Adnani, “Do not consult me, but give me information.”; 7. Cold hand of Syaikh Al-Adnani born a number of science seekers who eventually hold important position in Daulah Islam. One of them was Syaikh Manaf Ar-Rawi Rahimahullahu; 8. Syaikh Al-Adnani is the first man who formulated a comprehensive program for detainees covering various aspects: sharia, physical, and military capability.  The program that he created were participated by young people from various fields.  Prolog. These are some information related to the biography of Abu Muhammad Al-Adnani Asy-SyamiHafizhahullahu, named as ‘Manjanik’ (thrower of stones/bullets) of Daulah Islam. We wrote it not based on rumour or gossips, but directly fron trusted source and valid information. As stated by God “We (can) bear witness to no more than what has become known to us, and we could not guard against something that (lay hidden in the future and, hence) was beyond the reach of our perception.” (Yusuf: 81) We prayed to God that Syaikh Al-Adnani will live long; make all his deeds good, make all his word correct, and affirm him above the truth until he meet God sincerely.This is the end of our call, all praise for Allah Rabb of the whole universe. Shalawat and salam for the noble Prophet and Messanger. Author Syaikh Abu Sufyan Turki ibn Mubarak Al-Bin’ali, 27 Rajab 1435 H/26 May 2014.

content: Smoking. For those who smell cigarrete, do not get close to our mosque. Smoking clearly can harm himself and even can disturb other people.  Passive smoker could feel its impact.  The wives and children can be impacted. And so is bad effects as a result of cigarette smell that can cause disruption to concentration of congregation during mass prayer.  We feel uncomfortable if in our right side standing a smoker with disturbing bad breath. Could such person attending mass prayer with bad breath? The problem of law in smoking. Cigarette comes from infidel country. Muslim knew it in the 10th Hijriyah (Islamic Calendar).  British slipped these cigarettes among Muslims during Daulah Utsmaniyah time. The beginning was a Jew came to the Maghribi country briging ciggarets and he claimed them as medicine.  The cigarettes eventually spread to Egypt and other Muslim countries.  In the beginning of cigarrete invention, the ulama argued on its law.  Some said it was haram, some said makruh, some said mubah. However, the law of somking is haram. Some reasons that strengthen this opinion: 1) we should not harm ourself and do so towards other people. Allah said “and do not destroy one another: for, behold, God is indeed a dispenser of grace unto you (Chapter An Nisaa’:29). In other verse, Allah said “and let not your own hands throw you into destruction (Chapter Al-Baqoroh: 195). A hadith also mentioned not to harm other people, as said by Prophet Muhammad “You should not give bad impact (mudhorot) to other people and revenge against them ” (Hadith narrated by HR. Ibnu Majah no. 2340, Ad Daruquthni 3/77, Al Baihaqi 6/69, Al Hakim 2/66. Syaikh Al Albani said this hadits is authentic). The hadith clearly forbid causing mudhorot to other people and is inclusive of smoking. Tven the doctors has studied that cigarettes carry various types of poisons. The research also showed that 25 million people died a year mainly because of smoking. This could be an evidence that smoking can harm oneself; 2)- Human body does not belong that person; 3) Smoking is something that is khobits (dirty). Nabi shallallahu ‘alaihi wa sallam’s personality is that he allowed the thoyyib (good) ones and forbade the khobits (bad) ones. It is clear that the smell of cigarretes is not liked; Attending Mass Prayer with the breath of cigarettes.  In this matter, the ulama argued on whether someone with cigarette smell can participate in mass prayer.  Some said it was haram, other said makruh.  Precise opininon in this matter was that participationg in mass prayer for such people are forbidden.  Some of the reasons: 1- Hadits Ibnu ‘Umar radhiyallahu ‘anhuma, Prophet Muhammad shallallahu ‘alaihi wa sallam said, “Whoever eats this plant –which is onion-, hence do not get closer to our mosque” (Hadith Narrated by Bukhari no. 853 and Muslim no. 561). Prophet shallallahu ‘alaihi wa sallam forbade this because those with bad breath will harm other jamaah (congregation). Hence, the same thing was caused by cigarretes.2- Allah Ta’ala said, “And as for those who malign believing men and believing women without their having done any wrong - they surely burden themselves with the guilt of calumny, and [thus] with a flagrant sin!” (Chapter Al Ahzab: 58). The smell of cigarretes indeed harmed the mukmin (believing people); 3- A hadits qudsi mentioned, “Whoever harms my guardian (believing people/the mukmin), hence I allow you to fight against them” (Hadith narrated by Bukhari no. 6502). Herewith the reasons of attending mass prayers for those who had cigarrette breath are not allowed.  This does not mean that it is a relief for him not to participate in mass prayer, but as a warning for his haram action.  This is in order for him to eliminate the smell of cigarretes so he could participate in jamaah prayer.  However we prayed so that these people could quit smoking totally because doing so will cause great benefits for him. Read all in our website Rumaysho.Com >> http://rumaysho.com/…/bagi-yang-berbau-rokok-janganlah-deka…
